title: Presales Lead, Cloud
description:
Be a Part of Something BIG!

The role is responsible for pre-sales functionalities to provide technical guidance and support to sales teams and potential customers. This role involves understanding customer needs, developing and presenting solutions, and ensuring a seamless transition from prospecting to closing. The role will work closely with sales, product management, and engineering teams to drive the company's business growth

Make an impact by

Customer Engagement:

  • Work closely with prospective clients to understand their business requirements and technical needs.
  • Develop and deliver compelling presentations, demonstrations, and proposals.
  • Build and maintain strong relationships with key stakeholders and decision-makers.

Solution Development:

  • Design and customize solutions to meet the specific needs of customers.
  • Provide technical input and guidance during the proposal and bidding process.
  • Collaborate with product management and engineering teams to address technical challenges and refine product offerings.

Sales Support:

  • Partner with the sales team to identify opportunities and develop account strategies.
  • Assist in the qualification of leads and opportunities based on technical fit and business value.
  • Provide training and support to sales teams on technical aspects of the products or services.

Market and Product Insights:

  • Stay current on industry trends, competitive landscape, and emerging technologies.
  • Provide feedback to product management on customer needs and market demands.
  • Contribute to the development of product roadmaps and marketing strategies.

Performance Metrics:

  • Track and report on pre-sales activities and performance metrics.
  • Analyse and optimize the pre-sales process to improve efficiency and effectiveness.
  • Ensure that pre-sales engagements are aligned with revenue targets and business objectives.

Skills for Success: 

  • Bachelor's degree in a relevant field (e.g., Business, Engineering, Technology) or equivalent.
  • Experience in a pre-sales or technical role.  
  • Strong understanding of the GPU Cloud/ GPUaaS industry-specific technologies, products, or services.
  • Ability to display strong technical skills, able to work collaboratively with sales, products, engineering, operations, customers and partners to put together compelling winning solutions.
  • Excellent communication, presentation, and interpersonal skills.
  • Demonstrated ability to manage complex sales cycles and deliver technical solutions.

postedCompany.description:
The Singtel Group is Asia's leading communications group, providing a wide spectrum of multimedia and infocomms technology (ICT) solutions across 3 global business units.

Group Consumer focuses on next-generation communication, infotainment and technology services to consumers and small businesses. Group Enterprise provides innovative and comprehensive ICT solutions, i.e. satellite services, international data and managed services, cloud computing, enterprise mobility services, and end-to-end solutions. Group Digital L!fe strives to bring people together with a cutting edge mix of digital services such as NextGen TV, e-books, music, digital concierge, cloud-based gaming and hyperlocal content.

Headquartered in Singapore, Singtel’s 130 years of operating experience has played a pivotal role in the country’s transformation into a major communications hub. Our Australian arm, Optus is an innovative leader in integrated telecommunications. Through our strategic investments in five regional mobile operators, Telkomsel, Globe Telecom, Advanced Info Service, PBTL, and Bharti Airtel, we are a major communications player in Asia and Africa.

Singtel is the largest listed company on the Singapore Exchange by market capitalisation. We have a vast network of offices in countries and territories throughout Asia Pacific, in Europe, USA and Australia. The Group employs more than 21,000 staff worldwide and has served 468 million mobile customers globally as of 31 March 2013.
postedCompany.name: SINGAPORE TELECOMMUNICATIONS LIMITED
